class.description: Generative global planner for Nav2 (Mode B). Proposes K candidate start-to-goal paths via a PathModel (built-in analytic FanPathModel by default), validates each against the global costmap, and returns the shortest collision-free path. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound when no candidate is collision-free. The proposal model is a placeholder pending a real learned generative path model loaded via the PathModel seam.
